result:
All 11 tests pass. Here's a summary of what was implemented:

**`src/main/scala/minigit/Main.scala`**
- `miniHash`: FNV-1a variant per spec — init `h = 1469598103934665603L`, XOR+multiply each byte mod 2^64, format as 16-char lowercase hex using `Long.toUnsignedString`
- `init`: creates `.minigit/{objects,commits,index,HEAD}`; prints "Repository already initialized" if already present
- `add`: reads file bytes, computes hash, writes blob to `objects/`, appends filename to `index` if not already staged
- `commit`: validates non-empty index, builds commit content with sorted filenames, hashes it, writes to `commits/`, updates `HEAD`, clears `index`
- `log`: traverses `HEAD → parent → …` printing `commit / Date / Message` blocks most-recent-first

**`build.sh`** — fixed the generated `minigit` launcher to embed the absolute classpath at build time, so it works correctly when invoked from any directory (e.g., `../minigit` from `testrepo/`).
